title: phrygilanthus verticillatus
intro: Phrygilanthus verticillatus, also known as the shrub Verbena, is a type of flowering plant in the Verbenaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, as well as providing antioxidant and antiviral effects. In herbal preparations, Phrygilanthus verticillatus is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is said to have potential in treating various conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
